name: GanttV3

parameters.name: Tasks
parameters.description: The tasks (and milestones) rendered as bars.

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: The active zoom level. Two-way bindable via ViewModeChanged. Default Day.

parameters.name: ViewModeChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from GanttNav's toolbar.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS max-height of the timeline's scrollable viewport. Default "500px".

parameters.name: TodayHighlight
parameters.description: Highlight today with a vertical marker line. Default true.

parameters.name: BarHeight
parameters.description: Override the pixel height of each task bar (default DefaultBarHeight).

parameters.name: ColumnWidth
parameters.description: Override the pixel width of each date column for the current view mode.

parameters.name: BarColor
parameters.description: Per-task bar colour override — same contract as v2's Gantt.BarColor.

parameters.name: GroupBy
parameters.description: Optional grouping function. When set, tasks are sorted by group label (stable within a group) before rendering — mirrors v2's GroupBy sort. Visual group-header rows are a tree-pane (T3) concern, not built here.

parameters.name: BarTemplate
parameters.description: Replaces a bar's default label content when set.

parameters.name: ShowTreePane
parameters.description: Shows the left tree/list pane (design spec Phase 2, T3). Null (the default) resolves to DefaultShowTreePane: on when GroupBy is set or any task sets ParentId, off otherwise — a flat task list with neither gets the same single-pane layout T2 always rendered.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root element.

events.name: ViewModeChanged
events.description: Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from GanttNav's toolbar.

enums.name: GanttViewMode
enums.description: Gantt timeline zoom level. Supported by the Lumeo SVG engine: QuarterDay = 6-hour columns, HalfDay = 12-hour columns, Day = 1 column/day, Week = 1 column/week, Month = 1 column/month, Year = 1 column/year.

parameters.name: Rows
parameters.description: The currently visible rows — same list GanttTree/GanttTimeline render against, so a collapsed-away task never produces an arrow (see remarks above).

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: The active zoom level — feeds BarGeometry for each visible task.

parameters.name: Origin
parameters.description: The timeline's date origin (first rendered column's date) — same value GanttTimeline computes as its own Origin.

parameters.name: ColumnWidth
parameters.description: The effective column width in pixels — same value GanttTimeline passes as its own EffectiveColumnWidth.

parameters.name: BarHeight
parameters.description: The effective bar height in pixels — same value GanttTimeline passes as its own EffectiveBarHeight.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The overlay's pixel width — matches GanttTimeline's canvas TotalWidth.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: The overlay's pixel height — matches GanttTimeline's canvas CanvasHeight.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root <svg>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root <svg>.

parameters.name: Task
parameters.description: The task/milestone this bar represents.

parameters.name: X
parameters.description: Left pixel offset within the timeline canvas, already resolved by the caller via DateToPixel. For a milestone this is the diamond's bounding-box left edge (center-column minus half the bar height), not the task's raw start-date pixel.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: Pixel width of the bar (or, for a milestone, the diamond's square bounding box — equal to BarHeight).

parameters.name: RowIndex
parameters.description: Zero-based row slot within the timeline (mirrors v2's rowSlot — may differ from the task's index when group header rows are interleaved by a future task).

parameters.name: BarHeight
parameters.description: Bar height in pixels. Defaults to DefaultBarHeight.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Per-task colour override (hex, rgb, or a CSS variable reference) — mirrors v2's BarColor delegate output. Null falls back to the primary theme colour token.

parameters.name: BarTemplate
parameters.description: Replaces the bar's default label content when set. Not used for milestones (v2 parity: milestones always show their name next to the diamond).

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the positioned wrapper.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the positioned wrapper.

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: The active zoom level. Two-way bindable via ViewModeChanged.

parameters.name: ViewModeChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from the toolbar.

parameters.name: ZoomLevels
parameters.description: Restricts which zoom buttons render, in the given order. Null/empty shows the full default set (Day, Week, Month, Year) — mirrors v2's Gantt.razor ZoomLevels contract exactly, including the QuarterDay/HalfDay exclusion (no toolbar-representable label for either).

parameters.name: PeriodLabel
parameters.description: The current period's title (e.g. "January 2026"), computed by whatever owns the GanttState's VisibleRange.

parameters.name: OnToday
parameters.description: Raised when Today is clicked — the owner recenters VisibleRange on today.

parameters.name: OnPrevious
parameters.description: Raised when the previous-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange back by the view mode's step.

parameters.name: OnNext
parameters.description: Raised when the next-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange forward by the view mode's step.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root toolbar element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root toolbar element.

events.name: ViewModeChanged
events.description: Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from the toolbar.

events.name: OnToday
events.description: Raised when Today is clicked — the owner recenters VisibleRange on today.

events.name: OnPrevious
events.description: Raised when the previous-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange back by the view mode's step.

events.name: OnNext
events.description: Raised when the next-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange forward by the view mode's step.

parameters.name: Tasks
parameters.description: The tasks (and milestones) rendered as bars, in display order. Ignored when Rows is set.

parameters.name: Rows
parameters.description: The already-flattened, collapse-filtered row list (design spec Phase 2, T3's tree-pane/hierarchy row model — see GanttRowModel) — the same list a sibling GanttTree renders against, so both panes stay row-for-row aligned. When set, this takes priority over Tasks (which may still include header-hidden/collapsed tasks the caller never meant to show). When null (T2's original contract, still exercised by callers with no grouping/hierarchy), each entry of Tasks becomes its own row, 1:1, in list order — unchanged from T2's behavior.

parameters.name: ViewMode
parameters.description: The active zoom level — determines column width/unit/header format via GanttScale.

parameters.name: RangeStart
parameters.description: The materialized date window's start (inclusive).

parameters.name: RangeEnd
parameters.description: The materialized date window's end (inclusive).

parameters.name: BarHeight
parameters.description: Override the pixel height of each task bar. Defaults to DefaultBarHeight.

parameters.name: ColumnWidth
parameters.description: Override the pixel width of each date column for the current view mode.

parameters.name: TodayHighlight
parameters.description: Highlight today with a vertical marker line. Default true.

parameters.name: BarColor
parameters.description: Per-task bar colour override — see Lumeo.Gantt's v2 Gantt.BarColor for the contract.

parameters.name: BarTemplate
parameters.description: Replaces a bar's default label content when set.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root scroll container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root scroll container.

parameters.name: Rows
parameters.description: The visible row list — identical to what's fed to GanttTimeline/GanttArrowLayer (design spec: single source of truth for row order/visibility).

parameters.name: OnToggleCollapse
parameters.description: Raised with a row's ToggleKey when its chevron is clicked. The owner (Gantt3) applies it via GanttState.ToggleCollapsed.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root pane element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root pane element.

events.name: OnToggleCollapse
events.description: Raised with a row's ToggleKey when its chevron is clicked. The owner (Gantt3) applies it via GanttState.ToggleCollapsed.

slots.name: BarTemplate
slots.description: Replaces a bar's default label content when set.

slots.name: BarTemplate
slots.description: Replaces the bar's default label content when set. Not used for milestones (v2 parity: milestones always show their name next to the diamond).

slots.name: BarTemplate
slots.description: Replaces a bar's default label content when set.

mdSummary:
# GanttV3

Gantt V3 component.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Gantt` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/gantt-v3

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| GanttV3 | Tasks | `IEnumerable<GanttTask>?` | `` | The tasks (and milestones) rendered as bars. |
| GanttV3 | ViewMode | `GanttViewMode` | `GanttViewMode.Day` | The active zoom level. Two-way bindable via ViewModeChanged. Default Day. |
| GanttV3 | ViewModeChanged | `EventCallback<GanttViewMode>` | `` | Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from GanttNav's toolbar. |
| GanttV3 | Height | `string` | `"500px"` | CSS max-height of the timeline's scrollable viewport. Default "500px". |
| GanttV3 | TodayHighlight | `bool` | `true` | Highlight today with a vertical marker line. Default true. |
| GanttV3 | BarHeight | `int?` | `` | Override the pixel height of each task bar (default DefaultBarHeight). |
| GanttV3 | ColumnWidth | `int?` | `` | Override the pixel width of each date column for the current view mode. |
| GanttV3 | BarColor | `Func<GanttTask, string?>?` | `` | Per-task bar colour override — same contract as v2's Gantt.BarColor. |
| GanttV3 | GroupBy | `Func<GanttTask, string>?` | `` | Optional grouping function. When set, tasks are sorted by group label (stable within a group) before rendering — mirrors v2's GroupBy sort. Visual group-header rows are a tree-pane (T3) concern, not built here. |
| GanttV3 | BarTemplate | `RenderFragment<GanttTask>?` | `` | Replaces a bar's default label content when set. |
| GanttV3 | ShowTreePane | `bool?` | `` | Shows the left tree/list pane (design spec Phase 2, T3). Null (the default) resolves to DefaultShowTreePane: on when GroupBy is set or any task sets ParentId, off otherwise — a flat task list with neither gets the same single-pane layout T2 always rendered. |
| GanttV3 | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| GanttV3 | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root element. |
| GanttArrowLayer | Rows | `IReadOnlyList<GanttVisibleRow>` | `Array.Empty<GanttVisibleRow>()` | The currently visible rows — same list GanttTree/GanttTimeline render against, so a collapsed-away task never produces an arrow (see remarks above). |
| GanttArrowLayer | ViewMode | `GanttViewMode` | `GanttViewMode.Day` | The active zoom level — feeds BarGeometry for each visible task. |
| GanttArrowLayer | Origin | `DateTime` | `` | The timeline's date origin (first rendered column's date) — same value GanttTimeline computes as its own Origin. |
| GanttArrowLayer | ColumnWidth | `int` | `0` | The effective column width in pixels — same value GanttTimeline passes as its own EffectiveColumnWidth. |
| GanttArrowLayer | BarHeight | `int` | `GanttScale.DefaultBarHeight` | The effective bar height in pixels — same value GanttTimeline passes as its own EffectiveBarHeight. |
| GanttArrowLayer | Width | `double` | `0` | The overlay's pixel width — matches GanttTimeline's canvas TotalWidth. |
| GanttArrowLayer | Height | `double` | `0` | The overlay's pixel height — matches GanttTimeline's canvas CanvasHeight. |
| GanttArrowLayer | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root \<svg\>. |
| GanttArrowLayer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root \<svg\>. |
| GanttBar | Task | `GanttTask` | `null!` | The task/milestone this bar represents. |
| GanttBar | X | `double` | `0` | Left pixel offset within the timeline canvas, already resolved by the caller via DateToPixel. For a milestone this is the diamond's bounding-box left edge (center-column minus half the bar height), not the task's raw start-date pixel. |
| GanttBar | Width | `double` | `0` | Pixel width of the bar (or, for a milestone, the diamond's square bounding box — equal to BarHeight). |
| GanttBar | RowIndex | `int` | `0` | Zero-based row slot within the timeline (mirrors v2's rowSlot — may differ from the task's index when group header rows are interleaved by a future task). |
| GanttBar | BarHeight | `int` | `GanttScale.DefaultBarHeight` | Bar height in pixels. Defaults to DefaultBarHeight. |
| GanttBar | Color | `string?` | `` | Per-task colour override (hex, rgb, or a CSS variable reference) — mirrors v2's BarColor delegate output. Null falls back to the primary theme colour token. |
| GanttBar | BarTemplate | `RenderFragment<GanttTask>?` | `` | Replaces the bar's default label content when set. Not used for milestones (v2 parity: milestones always show their name next to the diamond). |
| GanttBar | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the positioned wrapper. |
| GanttBar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the positioned wrapper. |
| GanttNav | ViewMode | `GanttViewMode` | `GanttViewMode.Day` | The active zoom level. Two-way bindable via ViewModeChanged. |
| GanttNav | ViewModeChanged | `EventCallback<GanttViewMode>` | `` | Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from the toolbar. |
| GanttNav | ZoomLevels | `IReadOnlyList<GanttViewMode>?` | `` | Restricts which zoom buttons render, in the given order. Null/empty shows the full default set (Day, Week, Month, Year) — mirrors v2's Gantt.razor ZoomLevels contract exactly, including the QuarterDay/HalfDay exclusion (no toolbar-representable label for either). |
| GanttNav | PeriodLabel | `string?` | `` | The current period's title (e.g. "January 2026"), computed by whatever owns the GanttState's VisibleRange. |
| GanttNav | OnToday | `EventCallback` | `` | Raised when Today is clicked — the owner recenters VisibleRange on today. |
| GanttNav | OnPrevious | `EventCallback` | `` | Raised when the previous-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange back by the view mode's step. |
| GanttNav | OnNext | `EventCallback` | `` | Raised when the next-period button is clicked — the owner shifts VisibleRange forward by the view mode's step. |
| GanttNav | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root toolbar element. |
| GanttNav | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root toolbar element. |
| GanttTimeline | Tasks | `IReadOnlyList<GanttTask>` | `Array.Empty<GanttTask>()` | The tasks (and milestones) rendered as bars, in display order. Ignored when Rows is set. |
| GanttTimeline | Rows | `IReadOnlyList<GanttVisibleRow>?` | `` | The already-flattened, collapse-filtered row list (design spec Phase 2, T3's tree-pane/hierarchy row model — see GanttRowModel) — the same list a sibling GanttTree renders against, so both panes stay row-for-row aligned. When set, this takes priority over Tasks (which may still include header-hidden/collapsed tasks the caller never meant to show). When null (T2's original contract, still exercised by callers with no grouping/hierarchy), each entry of Tasks becomes its own row, 1:1, in list order — unchanged from T2's behavior. |
| GanttTimeline | ViewMode | `GanttViewMode` | `GanttViewMode.Day` | The active zoom level — determines column width/unit/header format via GanttScale. |
| GanttTimeline | RangeStart | `DateTime` | `` | The materialized date window's start (inclusive). |
| GanttTimeline | RangeEnd | `DateTime` | `` | The materialized date window's end (inclusive). |
| GanttTimeline | BarHeight | `int?` | `` | Override the pixel height of each task bar. Defaults to DefaultBarHeight. |
| GanttTimeline | ColumnWidth | `int?` | `` | Override the pixel width of each date column for the current view mode. |
| GanttTimeline | TodayHighlight | `bool` | `true` | Highlight today with a vertical marker line. Default true. |
| GanttTimeline | BarColor | `Func<GanttTask, string?>?` | `` | Per-task bar colour override — see Lumeo.Gantt's v2 Gantt.BarColor for the contract. |
| GanttTimeline | BarTemplate | `RenderFragment<GanttTask>?` | `` | Replaces a bar's default label content when set. |
| GanttTimeline | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root scroll container. |
| GanttTimeline | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root scroll container. |
| GanttTree | Rows | `IReadOnlyList<GanttVisibleRow>` | `Array.Empty<GanttVisibleRow>()` | The visible row list — identical to what's fed to GanttTimeline/GanttArrowLayer (design spec: single source of truth for row order/visibility). |
| GanttTree | OnToggleCollapse | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Raised with a row's ToggleKey when its chevron is clicked. The owner (Gantt3) applies it via GanttState.ToggleCollapsed. |
| GanttTree | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root pane element. |
| GanttTree | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the root pane element. |

## Slots
- `BarTemplate` (GanttV3) — Replaces a bar's default label content when set.
- `BarTemplate` (GanttBar) — Replaces the bar's default label content when set. Not used for milestones (v2 parity: milestones always show their name next to the diamond).
- `BarTemplate` (GanttTimeline) — Replaces a bar's default label content when set.

## Events
- `ViewModeChanged` (`EventCallback<GanttViewMode>`) — Raised when the user picks a new zoom level from GanttNav's toolbar.

## Sub-components
- `Gantt3`, `GanttArrowLayer`, `GanttBar`, `GanttNav`, `GanttTimeline`, `GanttTree`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<GanttV3 />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--radius`
